zeroconf_confirm.title: Add {name}
zeroconf_confirm.description: Connect to the Hypercolor daemon at {host}.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate {name}
reauth_confirm.description: Enter a new API key for the Hypercolor daemon at {host}.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Hypercolor daemon.

abort.already_configured: This Hypercolor daemon is already configured.
abort.missing_instance_id: The discovered daemon did not include an instance ID.

auth_invalid.title: Hypercolor API key was rejected
auth_invalid.description: Re-authenticate the Hypercolor integration with a key that can read and control the daemon.

daemon_unavailable.title: Hypercolor daemon is unavailable
daemon_unavailable.description: Home Assistant could not refresh Hypercolor. Check that the daemon is running and reachable.
